title: cienfuegosia hakeifolia
intro: Cienfuegosia hakeifolia, also known as the Desert Marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its bright yellow and orange flowers, as well as its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cienfuegosia hakeifolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and salves, to promote healing and alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions.
